title: Indulgent and Pillowy Spanish Ginger Paella
description: A unique twist on traditional paella, incorporating the warmth of ginger and the comfort of pillowy rice. Perfect for an indulgent dinner or special occasion.

ingredients.name: Ginger cordial
ingredients.notes: available at most health food stores or online

ingredients.name: Lamb broth
ingredients.notes: use a high-quality store-bought or homemade broth

ingredients.name: Extra virgin olive oil
ingredients.notes: use a good quality, cold-pressed oil

ingredients.name: Onion
ingredients.notes: use a sweet onion like Vidalia or Maui

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large, lacquerware-bowl over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and garlic and sauté until the onion is translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the rice and stir to combine with the onion and garlic mixture.
Add the ginger cordial, saffron, and broth, stirring to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and cover the bowl with aluminum foil or a lid.
Simmer for 20 minutes, or until the rice is tender and fluffy.
Add the artichoke hearts, roasted red peppers, and a pinch of salt and pepper, stirring to combine.
Simmer for an additional 5 minutes, or until the flavors have melded together.
Remove the bowl from the heat and let it rest for 5 minutes, covered with foil or a lid.
Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro and serve immediately.
